text: CLOSE RATIONALE: verified end-to-end 2026-07-02. Exact original command (AMATRIX_OPENCL_PROBE_GPU=1 tools/benchmark-regression.sh --against-baseline) rerun against the firewalled build: exit 0 (was 134), full 60-cell loop + report/PDF completed. incidents.csv: 0 cl::Error, 0 NSException/aborts (was 160 crash rows); remaining 98 incidents all benign not_run (88 metal-unsupported, 10 opencl-unavailable). Fix chain: all 50 AF .Call bridges behind C++ catch (6372bd4), AF OpenCL refused on Darwin/arm64, leaked probe env degrades to unavailable. Note: 15 perf-regression rows vs baseline (e.g. dense dist cold cpu) are a separate signal-quality concern tracked by the benchmark-harness epic amatrix-yux; this run also shared the machine with CI/test load so timings are noisy. Results in tools/benchmark-results/20260702-postfix-check.
